title: Passable Foliage 🌳
body:
# Passable Foliage 🌳

This mod removes collision from leaves and reduces the damage when falling into leaves. This can be applied to all entities or only to players.

Very helpful when you are riding through a forest.

There is also a new enchantment that makes you able to climb and stand on the leaves. (Fabric 1.19~1.20: the recipe of enchanted book requires Lychee mod to be installed)

### Technical information

There is a block tag that controls whether a block is passable. So you can customize everything yourself.
